hero.headline: Every wire, every outlet — *done right*
hero.subheadline: Atlanta's smartest electrical contractor. We know exactly how electricity works and how to install it safely in your space.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Complete Electrical Solutions
services_section.subheading: From simple outlets to complex installations, we handle every electrical need with precision and expertise.

services.title: Outlet & Switch Installation
services.description: New outlets, GFCI upgrades, switch replacements. Every connection tested and code-compliant.

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Electrical panel modernization and circuit additions. Safe, efficient power distribution for your property.

services.title: Wiring Services
services.description: Complete rewiring, new construction wiring, and electrical troubleshooting. Smart installation every time.

services.title: Code Compliance
services.description: Bringing older electrical systems up to current codes. Safety inspections and permit-ready work.

about.heading: Smart Electrical Work in Atlanta
about.body: Electrical Contracting Services, LLC brings deep electrical knowledge to every job in Atlanta. We understand how electricity works and install it right the first time. Our team handles everything from simple repairs to complex installations with the expertise that comes from years of hands-on experience.

reviews.name: Eric S.
reviews.text: The smartest electrical contractor I've worked with. These guys know everything about electricity and how to install it properly.

cta.heading: Ready for Smart Electrical Work?
